landing_hero_subtitle: a safe place where your thoughts can breathe without judgment
landing_hero_image_alt: machka writing her journal with her kitty ziggy
landing_features_title: a safe place for your thoughts
landing_features_1_description: your entries are encrypted and protected at all times.
landing_features_2_description: keep your journals safe on your own device.
landing_features_3_description: soon you'll be able to access your thoughts anywhere.
landing_features_4_description:
your journal is for your eyes only.
we respect your privacy.
landing_features_5_description: a distraction-free interface to help you focus.
landing_features_6_description: there are no deadlines or pressures. just you and your thoughts.
landing_security_1_description: shelter stores notes privately on your browser, so you can access them quickly, even offline. no one else can read them, not even us.
landing_security_2_description: your entries are end-to-end encrypted and stored offline first. we never read, scan, or sell your data. period.
landing_security_3_description: we strictly never collect personal data. there are no trackers, no ads, and no hidden analytics following you around.
landing_faqs_1_answer: shelter is a secure place where your thoughts can breathe. it's a secure journal web app where you can write freely without judgment in your favorite browser.
landing_faqs_2_answer: yes! you can find the source code on github and we welcome contributions.
landing_faqs_3_answer: all your entries are stored locally in your browser using encrypted storage.
landing_faqs_4_question: what is this project inspired by?
landing_faqs_4_answer: this project is inspired by the comment section of the song "shelter" by porter robinson & madeon. many people write daily entries there, and we wanted to create a personal, private space for those small slices of life. you can see the video here!
landing_faqs_5_answer: yes! shelter is free to use, ad-free, and open source. it's a labor of love.
landing_faqs_6_answer: the data is stored locally with strong encryption. you can learn more about our security protocols in our privacy policy.
landing_faqs_7_answer: nobody! even we can't read it. your entries are encrypted with your own key.
landing_faqs_8_answer: yes. we use end-to-end encryption and a 'privacy-first' architecture to ensure your shelter remains yours alone.
landing_faqs_9_answer:
she is our official mascot! you can often find her and her kitty ziggy wandering around the website.

special thanks to fiddle for creating all the wonderful artwork!
landing_start_description: start your journey at your own pace.
